---
title: "About"
---
### Now

(Updated as of July 2026:) I have worked freelance for many years, but am interested in transitioning to an ongoing, full time role.


### Professionally

I love data and research. I lean more toward the analytics and decision science parts of data science. R is my preferred programming language, although I'm always interested in learning new skills. I have been a freelancer in various areas of data, statistics, research - in doing, consulting, and teaching - for over a decade.

My educational background is a PhD (and MA) in social psychology (both experimental research and cross-sectional/survey methods) with a quantitative methods concentration from New York University. I previously earned a psychology BA from Northwestern University.

See my Resume for more details.


### Personally

Outside of work, I enjoy surfing, cooking, reading (news, non-fiction, and fiction), learning, and traveling.
